titleStmt.title: SII 22.178: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 178. (A.R. No. 178 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. ON THE SAME ROCK (NEAR OṬṬAIKUḶAM) VĪRARĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA—6th YEAR.

summary.p: This records the remission of all the taxes except kuḍimai due from the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands of five of the temples mentioned in No. 177 above by Sūryadēvaṉ Nīrēṟṟāṉ alias Rājarāja-Malaiyakularāyaṉ, the Malaiyamāṉ chief of Kiḷiyūr, for meeting the expenses of worship and offerings to the deities therein.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . virarājendracoḻa
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 6vatu kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ cūriyatevaṉ nir
reṟṟāṉāṉa rājarājamalayakularāyaṉeṉ Iṟaiyāṉaraiyūrā
ṉa śrī coḻakeraḷacaturvedimaṅkalattu naṭuviṟ tirumuṟṟattāḻvā
ṟkum tirumeṟkoyilāḻvāṟkum śrībadariyāḻvāṟkum tirusvargga
ttāḻvāṟkum durggaiyāṟkum Idevaṟku 6vatu nāḷ Iṟaiyiliyāka ka
lveṭṭiviṭṭa nilaṅkaḷāvaṉa puttūr Uḷḷiṭṭa piṭākaikaḷil tiruviṭai
yāṭṭaṅkaḷāṉa nilaṅkaḷ naṉcey puṉcey Uḷḷiṭṭa Eppeṟ
paṭṭa nilaṅkaḷ muṟṟukkum Iṟaikaḷ Epperpaṭṭaṉavum kuṭimai
kaḷum tavira Āḷvāṟku tantu Ikkoyilkaḷukku Amutupaṭikaḷukkum tirup
paṇikaḷum candrādityavaraikkum Eṉ vaṅśattukkum naṉṟāka Iṟai
yiliyāka kalveṭṭi viṭṭeṉ rājarājamalaiyakularāyaṉeṉ Idha
rmmattukku Aḻivu ceyvār taṅkaḷ Ammaikkut tāne miṇāḷaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
